candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be a component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of Goods Sold'. The adjacent rows indicate 'Cost of Goods Sold - Other' plus this D&A line reconcile to the selected total COGS, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Goods Sold'. 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS' is embedded within that total, not a separate same-level operating expense to add later.

candidates.why: This label appears twice, once under Selling Expenses and once under Administrative Expenses. In both cases it behaves as a component beneath the already selected parent rows: 'Selling Expenses - Other' plus D&A reconciles to 'Selling Expenses', and 'Administrative Expenses - other' plus D&A reconciles to 'Administrative Expenses'. Therefore these D&A amounts are already embedded in the selected XSGA component rows.

This is an explicit R&D D&A sub-component, but 'Research & Development Expenses - Other' plus this row reconciles to the already selected parent row 'Research and Development Costs'. Since that same R&D parent row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined total of 'Selling Expenses', 'Administrative Expenses', and 'Research and Development Costs'. The visible D&A rows are sub-components embedded within those selected parent rows, so no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
